subject: [AAF CertService] Increase certificates validity
commit_message:
[AAF CertService] Increase certificates validity

Root keys of certificate should have 10 years validity.

Issue-ID: AAF-1175
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Wrobel <tomasz.wrobel@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I0ff9ed6ff095baa0797a2af50eca740e9b4a5c6b

Certificates keys should have 10 years of validity instead of 1 year. 
I increased validity time. Sorry for confusion.
